title: Disabling autoescaping in template engines is a security sensitive practice
description: Disabling autoescaping in template engines can lead to Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities if user input is not properly escaped.
message: Disabling autoescaping in template engines is a security sensitive practice.
recommendation: Always enable autoescaping in template engines.

noncompliant.description: Disabling autoescaping in a Jinja2 template.

compliant.description: Enabling autoescaping in a Jinja2 template.

why_is_this_an_issue: Disabling autoescaping can lead to Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities if user input is not properly escaped.
how_to_fix: Always enable autoescaping in template engines.
